title: Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve | Release Date October 2, 2026
subtitle: Bandai Namco and Project Aces confirmed the franchise's 30th anniversary title launches October 2 on PS5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC, featuring Unreal Engine 5 cloudscapes, Joker Squadron, a Land Battleship superweapon, and online multiplayer
thumbnail_alt: Ace Combat 8 Wings of Theve fighter jet over stormy ocean, October 2026
content_html:
Bandai Namco and Project Aces stole the show at Sony's June 2, 2026 State of Play by dropping the official release date trailer for Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve. Built on Unreal Engine 5 and marking the franchise's 30th anniversary, the game launches globally on October 2, 2026 for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC via Steam.

Strangereal Story | Blitzkrieg, a Refugee Carrier, and a Fabricated Legend

Written by Sunao Katabuchi, the campaign is set in July 2029 within the franchise's beloved fictional universe of Strangereal. The story opens with a sudden, devastating blitzkrieg by the neighboring Republic of Sotoa, which rapidly captures Theve, the capital of the Federation of Central Usea (FCU). With the FCU military in ruins and its navy destroyed, you play as a pilot rescued from the sea by an obsolete, refugee-crowded aircraft carrier called the Endurance.

Command bestows upon you the legendary callsign "Wings of Theve" as a symbol of hope for the shattered military. The twist: the legend was entirely fabricated to maintain morale. You must now fly to actually live up to the myth and reclaim your homeland.

Joker Squadron | Your Crew Aboard the Endurance

As commander of Joker Squadron, you issue real-time commands to wingmen during flight and build relationships between missions:

  • Ellington Baxter ("Professor"): A former university lecturer who serves as the squad's stable, analytical backbone.
  • Tasha Seversky: A brilliant pilot formerly of Yuktobania's elite "Zvezda" acrobatics team, stranded on the Endurance when the war broke out.
  • William Coster ("Noise"): A skilled wingman and diehard rock music fan who blasts tunes in his cockpit mid-sortie.
  • Kate Evans ("Little Bee"): The battle-hardened leader of Queen Flight, the carrier's second squadron, who maintains a calm, upbeat exterior to protect pilot morale.

Gameplay Features | Living Skies, Superweapons, and Multiplayer

Unreal Engine 5 powers Living Skies, the game's dynamic multi-layered cloudscape system that directly impacts aerial visibility, missile tracking, and aerodynamic icing. The environmental simulation is the most technically ambitious in the franchise's history.

The trailer also showcases a massive Land Battleship superweapon, continuing the series' tradition of pitting players against sci-fi mega-structures. Bandai Namco confirmed the game launches with dedicated online multiplayer modes alongside the cinematic single-player campaign. A standout new feature is seamless first-person cinematic transitions bridging high-intensity cockpit combat and boots-on-the-ground squad interactions aboard the Endurance.

Editions, Pricing, and Pre-Order Bonuses

Every pre-order tier includes a playable F-14A aircraft and a modern console port of the 2006 classic Ace Combat Zero: The Belkan War.

Edition Price Early Access Key Inclusions
Standard Edition $69.99 (All Platforms) October 2 global launch Base game + F-14A + Ace Combat Zero
Deluxe Edition Digital / Physical 3 Days Early (Sep 28) Premium ACE Pass Plus Voucher, 30 tier skips, Mobius/Zvezda aircraft skins
Joker Flight Pack Physical Limited Store Exclusive 3 Days Early (Sep 28) Deluxe game, 2LP Vinyl Soundtrack, Slipmat, 208-page "Aces at War: A History 2029" hardcover artbook
